description: ManimCE visualization pipeline pilot for seminar 09 (RNN recurrence). Builds an isolated seminars/manim/ directory with a shared library, a pilot RNNUnroll scene, a render/sample/dedupe/hash toolchain, a strict-JSON vision critic subagent at .claude/agents/manim-frame-critic.md, and a 3-story ralph loop. ADVISORY DENY LIST (mechanically unenforced here; enforced via fix-step executor allow-list and render_loop.py git-diff guard): do NOT modify paths matching videos/prefill_decode/**, custom_config*.yml at the repo root, or media/videos/manim_optimizers/**. These are pre-existing assets on the 3b1b-manim stack and must remain untouched. The pilot's render quality is -qm; the critic's prompt whitelists sub-pixel AA artifacts. Loop terminates deterministically on approved=true, hash-stuck (iter >= 2), or max_iters=5.

userStories.title: Scaffold seminars/manim/ directory and shared library
userStories.description: Create the isolated ManimCE pilot directory with Makefile, requirements.txt, local .gitignore, README (exactly four H2 sections), shared/__init__.py and shared/neural.py (Neuron, LabeledBox, arrow_between). The repo-root .gitignore must NOT be modified. The Makefile's venv target probes for ffmpeg and latex, falling back to $HOME/homebrew/bin and /usr/local/texlive/2024/bin/universal-darwin respectively.
acceptanceCriteria: test -d seminars/manim/shared && test -d seminars/manim/scenes/rnn && test -d seminars/manim/scripts && test -d seminars/manim/prd && test -d seminars/manim/tests/fixtures/critic && test -d seminars/manim/tests/fixtures/dedupe
test -f seminars/manim/Makefile && test -f seminars/manim/requirements.txt && test -f seminars/manim/.gitignore && test -f seminars/manim/README.md
git diff --name-only main -- .gitignore | grep -qv . || { echo 'root .gitignore was modified'; exit 1; }
(cd seminars/manim && bash -c 'source bin/activate_env.sh 2>/dev/null; command -v ffmpeg >/dev/null && command -v latex >/dev/null')
seminars/manim/.venv/bin/python -c 'from shared.neural import Neuron, LabeledBox, arrow_between'

userStories.title: Scripts, critic subagent, validators, fixtures, tests, PRD
userStories.description: Create the automation surface for the loop: scripts/ (sample_frames.py, hash_video.py, validate_critic.py, verify_dedupe.py, render_loop.py), the vision critic subagent at .claude/agents/manim-frame-critic.md (model: sonnet, strict JSON contract, AA whitelist, severity rules), critic JSON fixtures (valid_approved, valid_rejected, invalid_missing_hash, invalid_bad_severity), dedupe PNG fixtures with a teaching-delta (pHash Hamming > 3), and the six named pytest cases for render_loop. Render is NOT invoked yet.
acceptanceCriteria: test -f seminars/manim/scripts/sample_frames.py && test -f seminars/manim/scripts/hash_video.py && test -f seminars/manim/scripts/validate_critic.py && test -f seminars/manim/scripts/verify_dedupe.py && test -f seminars/manim/scripts/render_loop.py

seminars/manim/.venv/bin/python -c "import frontmatter; d=frontmatter.load('.claude/agents/manim-frame-critic.md'); assert d.metadata['model']=='sonnet'; assert 'vision' in (d.metadata.get('description','') + d.content).lower()"

userStories.title: RNN pilot scene and end-to-end critic loop
userStories.description: Implement scenes/rnn/rnn_unroll.py with class RNNUnroll(Scene) animating h_t = tanh(W_ih x_t + W_hh h_{t-1}) for three timesteps, importing >= 2 of {Neuron, LabeledBox, arrow_between} from shared.neural. Then drive the render/sample/dedupe/critic/fix loop end-to-end. The ralph leader invokes the manim-frame-critic subagent each iteration, feeds its JSON to scripts/render_loop.py, and fixes via an executor restricted to scenes/rnn/rnn_unroll.py and shared/neural.py. Loop terminates on approved=true, hash-stuck (iter >= 2), or max_iters=5; writes .out/critic_final.json or .out/escalation.json respectively.
acceptanceCriteria: seminars/manim/.venv/bin/python -c "import ast; src=open('seminars/manim/scenes/rnn/rnn_unroll.py').read(); imports={a.name for n in ast.walk(ast.parse(src)) if isinstance(n, ast.ImportFrom) and n.module=='shared.neural' for a in n.names}; assert len(imports)>=2, imports"

h1=$(seminars/manim/.venv/bin/python seminars/manim/scripts/hash_video.py seminars/manim/.out/RNNUnroll.mp4); h2=$(seminars/manim/.venv/bin/python seminars/manim/scripts/hash_video.py seminars/manim/.out/RNNUnroll.mp4); test "$h1" = "$h2" && echo "$h1" | grep -qE '^[0-9a-f]{64}$'
